titleStmt.title: SII 19.84: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 84. (A.R. No. 689 of 1904.) TIRUPPĀṞKAḌAL, WALAJAPET TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT. ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE, KHARAPURĪŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This records an agreement given by the ēri-vāriyam (tank supervision committee) of the mahāsabhā of Kāvidippākkam alias Amaninārāyaṇa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Paḍuvūr-kōṭṭam, to burn 2 perpetual lamps in the temple of Mūlasthānattu-Perumānaḍigaḷ at Tirukkarapuram with the interest on 30 and 3/4 kaḻañju of gold deposited with them by Śōḻakōṉ alias Arudiyarmaṉ a native of Pāṇḍi-nāḍu. This assembly is stated have comprised other committees besides; viz. ūr-vāriyam, udāsīna-vāriyam, kaḻani-vāriyam, the Two hundred elders, bhaṭṭas and viśishṭhas.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakecarivaṟmaṟku yāṇṭu nālāvatu paṭuvūrkkoṭṭattuk kāvatippākkamākiya Amaṉi nārāyaṇaccaturvvetimaṅkalat tivvāṭṭai Ūrvāriyap perumakkaḷum Udāsiṉavāriyap perumakkaḷum Erivāriyap perumakkaḷum kaḻanivāriyap perumakkaḷum Irunūṟṟuvap perumakkaḷum bhaṭṭarkaḷum viśiṣṭarkaḷum Uḷḷiṭṭa mahāsabhaiyom Emmurt tirukkarapurattu
mulastānattup perumāṉaṭikaḷukkup pāṇṭināṭṭu veṇpaikkuṭināṭṭu nākappaṭṭinac coḻa koṉākiya Aṟutiyarmaṉ candraādittaruḷḷaḷavum tirukkarapurattupperumāṉaṭikaḷukkuiraṇṭu nantāviḷak kerippatāka Emmur Erivāriyap perumakkaḷvaḻi muppattiṉkaḻañce mukkāl poṉ koṇṭu Immuppatiṉkaḻañce mukkāṟp poṉ(ṉā)ṉālum vanta pṛddhiyiṉāl Ivvi
raṇṭu nāṭāviḷak kiravum pakalum Erippatākavum .
Digital edition of SII 19.84 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
